story_summary: A TikTok Lite montage starts with a four-child group photo labeled '2006 vs 2026', then alternates between close-up child name cards and scene-specific '2026' future snapshots, before ending on a TikTok Lite end screen.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata, 1 fps contact-sheet review, scene-change inspection, and exact midpoint frame extraction
source_sampling.notes: Hard cuts were detected around 2.125s, 3.833333s, 6.25s, 9.875s, 12.291667s, 16.0s, 18.25s, 22.083333s, and 24.375s. The final child-to-future pairing remains review-required because the source implies but does not explicitly explain each relationship.

audio_notes: Audio was extracted directly from the input video into source_audio.mp3 and should be used as the default Shotstack audio source.

scenes.summary: A group photo shows four pre-teen girls standing arm in arm on a Chinatown street, with bold text reading '2006 vs 2026' across the center.
on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username are visible in the corners.
scenes.environment: Busy Chinatown street with yellow taxis, storefront signs, and a decorative gate in the background.
scenes.transformation_role: intro card establishing the child group and the future-tense premise

scenes.summary: A close crop isolates the curly-haired girl from the group photo, labeled 'Jessica' in bold white text.
on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username remain visible.
scenes.environment: Same outdoor Chinatown background blurred behind the child close-up.
scenes.transformation_role: name card for the first child subject

scenes.summary: A heavily tattooed young woman in an orange jail uniform sits in a courtroom, with large centered text reading '2026'.
on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username remain visible.
scenes.environment: Courtroom interior with judge, attorneys, wood paneling, and officers in the background.
scenes.transformation_role: first future snapshot, implied to follow Jessica

scenes.summary: A close crop isolates the straight-haired black-haired girl from the original group photo, labeled 'Lina'.
on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username remain visible.
scenes.environment: Same outdoor Chinatown background blurred behind the child close-up.
scenes.transformation_role: name card for the second child subject

on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username remain visible.

scenes.transformation_role: second future snapshot, implied to follow Lina

scenes.summary: A close crop isolates the blonde girl with glasses from the original group photo, labeled 'Rachel'.
on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username remain visible.

on_screen_text: TikTok Lite watermark and username remain visible.

scenes.summary: A young adult man takes a bathroom mirror selfie while centered text reads '2026'. The montage position implies this may be the future counterpart to Amanda, but the relationship is not made explicit in the source.
